title: Senior Teacher - IIIT Hyderabad - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIIT Hyderabad - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIIT Hyderabad. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About IIIT Hyderabad:
IIIT Hyderabad is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad!
